title: coccocypselum pleuropodum
intro: Coccocypselum pleuropodum, also known as the "Wild Tangerine", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Coccocypselum pleuropodum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
